title: Per-Origin Politeness, Concurrency, Retry Classification, and Adaptive Rate · Program Brief: Origin Concurrency Cap
summary: A global sleep still sends bursts per host, retries permanent blocks, ignores Retry-After, synchronizes workers, and increases load after slow responses. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the origin concurrency cap increment in per-origin politeness and retry controller. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, ch…
objectives: Limit active work per origin and globally while accounting for redirects, browser resources, retries, and queued fairness.
Schedule requests by effective origin with minimum start spacing, stable crawler identity, robots and owner policy, and monotonic time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-politeness-rate-retries-4
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-politeness-rate-retries-4.
# Case 1655: a local-server failure rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance.
# Changed case: change a robots, canonical, indexing, structured-data, or accessibility signal and retain the conflict.
def worked_scraper_politeness_rate_retries_4(origins: int = 3, minimum_spacing_ms: int = 800, maximum_origin_concurrency: int = 2, retry_budget: int = 3, policy_violations: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorizationworked4",
        "url1655",
        "response4dekrow",
        "treeworked41655",
        "frontier1655worked4",
        "report4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if origins < 1 or minimum_spacing_ms < 0:
        return False, origins, "politeness-shape"
    if maximum_origin_concurrency < 1 or maximum_origin_concurrency > 4:
        return False, maximum_origin_concurrency, "origin-concurrency"
    if retry_budget < 0 or retry_budget > 5:
        return False, retry_budget, "retry-amplification"
    if policy_violations > 0:
        return False, policy_violations, "politeness-violation"
    assert maximum_origin_concurrency <= 4 and policy_violations == 0
    return True, minimum_spacing_ms, "polite-origin-controller"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-origin-concurrency-cap-jbmjoy
# Competency: scraper-origin-concurrency-cap.
# Case 4798: an authorized nonprofit content audit.
# Operating constraint: no block, CAPTCHA, identity, or fingerprint evasion is permitted.
# Changed case: change a robots, canonical, indexing, structured-data, or accessibility signal and retain the conflict.
def evidence_scraper_origin_concurrency_cap_jbmjoy(origins: int = 3, minimum_spacing_ms: int = 800, maximum_origin_concurrency: int = 2, retry_budget: int = 3, policy_violations: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_jbmjoy = "jbmjoy-yojmbj-4798"
    assert evidence_variant_jbmjoy
    evidence_axes_jbmjoy = (
        "authorizationjbmjoy",
        "url4798",
        "responseyojmbj",
        "treejbmjoy4798",
        "frontier4798jbmjoy",
        "reportyojmbj4798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_jbmjoy)) == 6
    if origins < 1 or minimum_spacing_ms < 0:
        return False, origins, "politeness-shape"
    if maximum_origin_concurrency < 1 or maximum_origin_concurrency > 4:
        return False, maximum_origin_concurrency, "origin-concurrency"
    if retry_budget < 0 or retry_budget > 5:
        return False, retry_budget, "retry-amplification"
    if policy_violations > 0:
        return False, policy_violations, "politeness-violation"
    assert maximum_origin_concurrency <= 4 and policy_violations == 0
    return True, minimum_spacing_ms, "polite-origin-controller"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Limit active work per origin and globally while accounting for redirects, browser resources, retries, and queued fairness.
